title: Cobblemon Gui Gamma Emerald Edition
description: Resource pack that modifies Cobblemon's GUI texture to one inspired by Pokemon Emerald. which is a total remake.
body:
![GE logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cbc197a83725b1d410231afbfcc7b18537c6ca89.png)
This resource pack is for the [Cobblemon](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon) mod. It changes the original Gui textures of the mod to one inspired by Pokemon Emerald, which is a total remake.
![separador_vermout](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c55ff2d602d0085b0cfe4f04bf070abd67f969e6.png)
### Summary Gui
![Summary](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/97c057d98db1c94e0e37e9f077780e0c2d3286c3.png)
![separador_vermout](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c55ff2d602d0085b0cfe4f04bf070abd67f969e6.png)
### Features(so far!): **Cobblemon** + Created to work with Minecraft 1.21.1 - Cobblemon 1.7+ + Party List (Completed) + Summary (80% Complete) + Pc Gui (Completed) + Type & Category Icons (Completed all icons of type) + Battle Gui (50% complete) + Sounds + Gui (Clicks)
![separador_vermout](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c55ff2d602d0085b0cfe4f04bf070abd67f969e6.png)
### Planned Features + Pokemon Interaction GUI + Starter Selection GUI + Trade Gui + Dialogue & Npc Gui + Pokenav Gui
![separador_vermout](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c55ff2d602d0085b0cfe4f04bf070abd67f969e6.png)
### Mod Support | Mod | Cobblemon Gui GE | | ----------- | ----------- | | [Cobblemon 1.7+](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon) | >= 1.0 | | MoreCobblemonTweaks | >= 1.0 | | Cobblemon RIze Tweaks | next update | | ---- | ---- | _**Nota:**_ Upgrade progress will depend on the support shown.
![separador_vermout](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c55ff2d602d0085b0cfe4f04bf070abd67f969e6.png)
### More If you find bugs don't hesitate to tell me about them, including suggestions, ideas or support for specific mods!

👆 You need to be in the Official Cobblemon Discord Server🔹.
